engine_apf_state_dev_side: DISABLED (reload_services confirmed) — Genspark answered naturally without intercept
notes: GROUND-TRUTH SSE SCHEMA CAPTURED for iter13 envelope design. (1) ENDPOINT: POST https://www.genspark.ai/api/agent/ask_proxy over HTTP/2, response Content-Type=text/event-stream, status=200, body_size=29489 bytes, total elapsed ~35.24s. (2) PAGE NAVIGATION: after submit, URL becomes https://www.genspark.ai/agents?id=<project_uuid> (a project page). (3) EVENT COUNT: 102 SSE events parsed, terminator-by-content-shape = `message_result` (no explicit `*_end` event). (4) EVENT TYPE SEQUENCE (counts): project_start×1, message_field×10, message_start×2, project_field×2, message_field_delta×84 (the bulk), message_result×3. Unique types: ['message_field', 'message_field_delta', 'message_result', 'message_start', 'project_field', 'project_start']. Last 5 type sequence: [message_result, message_start, message_result, message_result, project_field]. (5) EVENT FRAMING: each event is a single `data: {json}\n\n` line; every payload carries `type` (string discriminator), `_event_index` (monotonic int starting 0), and either `message_id` or `id`/`project_id` (uuids). (6) CONTENT PATH (delta channel): `message_field_delta` carries `field_name`, `delta`, `message_id`, `project_id`. The 84 deltas for field_name='tool_calls[1].function.arguments' concatenate into a 268-byte JSON object {"questions":[{"question":"날씨를 확인할 지역","options":[...]}]}, which the frontend renders as the regional weather picker UI seen in after_send.png. (7) PLAIN-TEXT CONTENT PATH: field_name='content' appeared once (count 1) suggesting that for non-tool-call replies, deltas with field_name='content' would carry the visible assistant text — needs separate observation to confirm. (8) TERMINATOR: `message_result` IS the de-facto completion signal — its payload contains the COMPLETE assembled assistant message (`message.content`, full `message.tool_calls`, `message.session_state._finish_reason='stop'`, `_llm_usage` token counts). No explicit `message_end`/`project_end`/`done`/`[DONE]` sentinel observed. (9) REFUTES iter7-11 project-style SSE (which assumed nested `data.choices[].delta.content`) AND iter12 OpenAI-compat SSE (which assumed `id`+`choices[].delta`). The real schema is FLAT per-event: top-level `type` discriminator + `field_name`/`delta` pattern. (10) PROJECT META events `project_start` (carries `id`+`type`) and `project_field` (carries `field_name='name', field_value='오늘 날씨 문의'` — Genspark auto-titles the project from prompt). (11) MESSAGE META events: `message_field` mostly emits `field_name='_updatetime'` (heartbeat/lease, every ~5s) plus `reasoning_id`, `reasoning_encrypted_content`, `status`. (12) CAVEAT — this benign prompt triggered the TOOL-CALL branch (project card UI for ask_user_questions). A second capture with a 1-line factual prompt (e.g. '1+1=?') is recommended to confirm the content-only delta path and to see whether terminator differs. Full sanitized schema dump in files/1031/extract_1031.json; full HAR (gitignored) in files/1031/genspark_native_1031.har.

key_design_inputs_for_iter13.id_correlation_field_project: id and project_id (same uuid, depending on event type)
key_design_inputs_for_iter13.TBD_next_capture: Submit a single-line factual prompt (e.g. '1+1=?') without engine intercept to capture the content-only delta path (vs the tool-call branch captured here)

observed_user_visible_response: Regional weather picker UI rendered inside a project card titled '오늘 날씨 문의' — options: 현재 위치 근처 / 서울 / 부산 / 인천 / 대구 / 직접 입력 / 기타

capture_method: windows-mcp UI automation (Chrome had no CDP port; existing logged-in genspark session reused). DevTools opened via F12, Network tab + Preserve log + Disable cache. Prompt typed via Type tool, submitted via Enter. HAR saved via Export HAR (sanitized) button to worktree files/1031/.
